lineas: .D     Bm    A  D   G          D
Holy, holy, ho_ly, Lord God Almighty,
.A            Bm  A       E                  A
Early in the mor_ning my song shall rise to Thee;
.D     Bm    A  D   G            D       Bm  Bm/A     G  D     Em      A    D
Holy, holy, ho_ly, merciful and mighty,|God in three persons, blessed Trinity.
.D     Bm    A  D   G               D
Holy, holy, ho_ly, all the saints adore Thee,
.A                  Bm     A       E                A
Casting down their golden crowns around the glassy sea;
.D    Bm      A   D     G              D          Bm     Bm/A     G   D   Em   A          D
Cherubim and seraphim, falling down before Thee,|Which, wert and art and ever more shall be.
.D     Bm    A  D   G                   D
Holy, holy, ho_ly, though the darkness hide Thee,
.A                 Bm     A       E             A
Though the eye of sinful men Thy Glory may not see;
.D    Bm       A  D   G               D          Bm  Bm/A    G      D  Em       A   D
Only Thou art ho_ly, there is none beside Thee,|Per_fect in power, in love and purity.
.D     Bm    A  D   G          D
Holy, holy, ho_ly, Lord God Almighy,
.A                   Bm         A       E                 A
All Thy works shall praise Thy Name in earth and sky and sea;
.D     Bm    A  D   G            D       Bm  Bm/A     G  D     Em      A    D
Holy, holy, ho_ly, merciful and mighty,|God in three persons, blessed Trinity.
